metadata.description: Curated collection of specialized agent plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: doc-maintainer
plugins.description: Specialized agent for documentation auditing, maintenance, and bootstrapping. Supports software dev docs and wiki content types with audit, active, and bootstrap operations.

plugins.name: doc-pr-reviewer
plugins.description: Reviews Pull Requests for documentation compliance. Config-aware with CI automation. Inherits conventions from doc-maintainer. Supports advisory, strict, auto-fix, and CI modes.
